headline: How KeyCorp’s New Bond Issue and US$1 Billion Tech Bet Will Impact KeyCorp (KEY) Investors
summary: In June 2026, KeyCorp announced a new fixed-income offering with senior and subordinated medium-term notes due 2031, alongside recent revenue and earnings beats driven by commercial loan growth, wider net interest margins, and higher fee income. This combination of a fresh bond issuance, a roughly US$1.00 billion technology and AI investment plan, and rising institutional ownership highlights how KeyCorp is funding growth while attracting large, long-term shareholders. Now we’ll assess how...

headline: KeyCorp (KEY) Stock After 46% One-Year Gain Is The Valuation Still Attractive
summary: If you are wondering whether KeyCorp stock still offers value after a strong run, this article breaks down what the current price might be implying about the company. KeyCorp shares last closed at US$22.59, with returns of 5.1% over the past month, 7.7% year to date, and 45.7% over the last year. The 3 year return is 182.0% and the 5 year return is 35.5%. Recent coverage around U.S. banks has focused on interest rate expectations, credit quality trends, and how regional banks are balancing...
